ddls:
CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number assigned to the professional */,
  "license_type_id" INTEGER /* Type of license (e.g., Associate Broker, Broker) */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the license was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the license expires */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the license (e.g., Active, Revoked, Expired) */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the professional who holds the license */,
  "issuing_authority" TEXT /* Authority that issued the license */,
  "license_fees" TEXT /* Fees paid for the license */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES professionals ("professional_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_licenses_license_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("license_type_id") REFERENCES license_types ("license_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "professionals" (
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each professional */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the professional */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the professional */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the professional */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the professional */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the professional */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the professional */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the professional */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the professional */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the professional */,
  "social_security_number" TEXT /* Social security number of the professional */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "company_type" TEXT /* Type of company (e.g., Brokerage, Property Management) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the company */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the company */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the company */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the company */,
  "broker_in_charge" INTEGER /* Broker in charge of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_history" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* ID of the professional */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "employment_type" TEXT /* Type of employment (e.g., Associate Broker, Broker) */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date the professional was hired */,
  "sever_date" TEXT /* Date the professional left the company */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the professional */,
  "salary" TEXT /* Salary of the professional */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_history_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_history_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES professionals ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compliance_records" (
  "compliance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compliance record */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* ID of the professional */,
  "compliance_type" TEXT /* Type of compliance (e.g., Background Check, Continuing Education) */,
  "compliance_date" TEXT /* Date the compliance was completed */,
  "compliance_status" TEXT /* Status of the compliance (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the compliance */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the compliance expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("compliance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compliance_records_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES professionals ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "continuing_education" (
  "ce_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each continuing education record */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* ID of the professional */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_date" TEXT /* Date the course was completed */,
  "hours" INTEGER /* Number of hours of the course */,
  "instructor" TEXT /* Name of the instructor */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution providing the course */,
  "course_description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ce_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_continuing_education_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES professionals ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "background_checks" (
  "bc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each background check */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* ID of the professional */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date the background check was performed */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the background check (e.g., Passed, Failed) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the background check */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the background check expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_background_checks_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES professionals ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Regulator, Company Admin, Professional) */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* ID of the professional if the user is a professional */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES professionals ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., Login, Search, View) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource accessed (e.g., professional, company, license) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "permission_description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "license_types" (
  "license_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license type */,
  "license_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the license type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the license type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discipline_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each disciplinary action */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* ID of the professional */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date the action was taken */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., Suspension, Revocation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discipline_actions_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES professionals ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "education_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* ID of the professional */,
  "degree" TEXT /* Degree earned by the professional */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Name of the institution */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date of graduation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES professionals ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "certifications" (
  "certification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each certification */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* ID of the professional */,
  "certification_name" TEXT /* Name of the certification */,
  "issuing_authority" TEXT /* Authority that issued the certification */,
  "issue_date" TEXT /* Date the certification was issued */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the certification expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("certification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_certifications_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES professionals ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "insurance" (
  "insurance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance policy */,
  "professional_id" INTEGER /* ID of the professional */,
  "policy_number" TEXT /* Policy number */,
  "insurance_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance (e.g., Liability, Errors & Omissions) */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Name of the provider */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date the policy becomes effective */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date the policy expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("insurance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_insurance_professional_id FOREIGN KEY ("professional_id") REFERENCES professionals ("professional_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_branches" (
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each branch */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company */,
  "branch_name" TEXT /* Name of the branch */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the branch */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the branch */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the branch */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the branch */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("branch_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_branches_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)
